overall.description: A third-person gameplay sequence from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a cowboy character exploring a historic residential district at night. The character walks through a mansion garden, exits onto a wet cobblestone street illuminated by gas lamps, and enters the side garden of another mansion. The atmosphere is moody and atmospheric with detailed Victorian architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: mansion front garden with central fountain

events.description: character circles around the stone fountain in the garden

agents.ego_description: walking through the mansion garden, circling the central fountain and heading toward the exit gate

entered.detail: large two-story wooden mansion with lit windows and front porch
circular stone fountain basin in the center of the garden path
ornate wrought iron gate marking the property exit
flowering bushes lining the garden path
lit garden lantern on a post

segments.scene_description: The character explores the front garden of a Victorian mansion at night, walking around a central stone fountain. The mansion's windows glow warmly against the dark sky, and ornate iron gates stand at the property's edge.

events.description: exits the mansion garden through the iron gate onto the public street

agents.ego_description: passing through the front gate and stepping onto the wet cobblestone street

notable_agents.action: horse-drawn carriage parked along the curb

entered.detail: tall cast-iron street lamp illuminating the wet cobblestones
wooden horse-drawn carriage parked on the street side

segments.scene_description: The character exits through the iron gates onto a wet cobblestone street illuminated by gas lamps. A horse-drawn carriage is parked nearby as the character leaves the first mansion behind and enters the public road.

scene_state.functional_zone: wet cobblestone residential street lined with mansions

events.description: character turns and crosses toward the opposite side of the street

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the cobblestone street, passing under street lamps and approaching a second mansion

entered.detail: another large Victorian mansion with illuminated windows at the end of the street
mature oak tree with Spanish moss hanging from branches

segments.scene_description: The character walks along the wet cobblestone street lined with historic mansions and gas street lamps. The first mansion recedes into the distance as the character approaches a second mansion further down the road.

scene_state.functional_zone: side garden path with dense foliage and weeping willows

events.description: turns off the street and enters the side garden of the second mansion
enters darker garden area with dense tree cover blocking street lamps

agents.ego_description: walking up the side path of the mansion, moving through dense garden vegetation toward the back of the property

entered.detail: decorative iron fence marking the property boundary
large weeping willow tree with drooping branches
thick ferns and tropical vegetation lining the path
warm light illuminating the mansion's side entrance

segments.scene_description: The character turns off the street and enters a narrow side garden path of the second mansion. The environment becomes darker and more enclosed with dense vegetation, weeping willows, and a dirt path leading alongside the house.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the private grounds of a Victorian estate out onto a moody, lamp-lit city street. It begins in a dark front garden, circling a central stone fountain while the mansion's windows cast a warm glow against the night sky. As the character moves forward, the scene shifts through ornate iron gates and onto a wet cobblestone road where gas lamps illuminate the damp surfaces and a parked horse-drawn carriage. The camera then follows the character along this historic thoroughfare, leaving the first estate behind as the street opens up to reveal a second mansion further in the distance.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement as the character transitions from an open street into the secluded, shadowed confines of a private estate. It begins with the character turning off the main road, leaving the brightness of the street behind to enter a narrow side garden path. As the camera follows, the environment becomes increasingly enclosed, shifting from the open urban layout to a space dominated by dense vegetation and weeping willows. The scene then tightens further as the path turns to dirt, leading the character deeper alongside the mansion's wall into a darker, more atmospheric setting.
